public PathControl(Comic comic)          {              InitializeComponent();                this.comic = comic;              DataContext = this;                  options = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<Options>(Properties.Settings.Default.Options);                if (options != null)              {                  foreach (var path in options.Paths)                  {                      if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(path))                          rootCB.Items.Add(path);                  }                    if (rootCB.Items.Count > 0)                      rootCB.SelectedIndex = 0;              }          }

public PathControl(Comic comic)          {              InitializeComponent();                this.comic = comic;              DataContext = this;                  options = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<Options>(Properties.Settings.Default.Options);                if (options != null)              {                  foreach (var path in options.Paths)                  {                      if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(path))                          rootCB.Items.Add(path);                  }                    if (rootCB.Items.Count > 0)                      rootCB.SelectedIndex = 0;              }          }
